title: Samo Burja on Growth, Energy, and AI
content: Theo Jaffee interviews Samo Burja of Bismarck Analysis on AI's impact on industrial capacity and economic growth. Burja argues AI will drive demand across energy, manufacturing, construction, and supply chains rather than remaining a software-only phenomenon. They examine US-China dynamics, demographic decline, fertility, state capacity, welfare systems, and automation's political economy. Burja contends societies adept at organizing people and resources will hold advantages in the AI era.

title: 对于 talkatone 的 udp 测试结果(成功打通电话)
content: Testing Talkatone VoIP calls reveals that purchased residential SOCKS proxies lack UDP forwarding, which is required for VoIP. The workaround: route TCP traffic through the SOCKS proxy for login/authentication, while disabling UDP forwarding to let UDP packets exit through the local network directly. This allows successful STUN hole-punching with the local ISP connection for calls. Verification via ip.skk.moe/split-tunnel confirms UDP blocking on proxy-only routes versus local IP display when UDP routes locally.

title: Speech Plus Prose 2000 vintage speech synthesizer, as used by Stephen Hawking [video]
content: The video features the Speech Plus Prose 2000, a vintage 1980s speech synthesizer famously used by Stephen Hawking. The device converted text to speech using a DECtalk-based system, giving Hawking his iconic robotic voice. Despite newer technology becoming available, Hawking continued using this synthesizer for decades, partly because its distinctive voice had become part of his identity and because he found it the most intelligible system for communication.

title: 今夜过后，马斯克成为人类首位万亿富翁
content: SpaceX launched a record $75 billion IPO at $135 per share, valuing the company at $1.77 trillion—over double Saudi Aramco's 2019 record. The offering, which bypassed traditional roadshows, could push Elon Musk's net worth to $970 billion, nearing trillionaire status. Despite $13 billion in cumulative losses and Q1 revenue of just $47 billion, investors bet on SpaceX's Starlink dominance, rocket launch supremacy, and AI ambitions through xAI. Musk retains 82-84% voting control. Early backers including Founders Fund and a16z secured massive returns.

title: 神秘失窃案背后，比亚迪如何“驯服”泰国工厂？｜深氪lite
content: BYD's Rayong factory in Thailand overcame cultural and labor challenges to become a respected local employer. The company spent two years preparing—researching local conditions, creating bilingual training materials, and offering above-market wages with comprehensive benefits. BYD adapted its management style to Thai cultural norms emphasizing dignity and work-life balance, implementing complaint mechanisms and cultural sensitivity training. A "seed talent" program sent promising Thai employees to China for advanced training who then became cultural bridges as managers. Despite these efforts, the factory reached only 50% utilization after 18 months, below domestic and Toyota benchmarks. BYD's experience highlights that overseas factory success requires becoming part of the local community rather than simply transplanting Chinese methods. The company now faces scaling challenges as it expands to Indonesia, Brazil, and other markets, each requiring distinct cultural approaches.

title: Removing 'um' from a recording is harder than it sounds
content: Removing filler words like "um" from audio recordings is technically difficult. Simple cutting creates abrupt, unnatural transitions. More advanced methods that resynthesize speech often sound artificial or require extensive manual correction. The core challenge lies in smoothly bridging the gap where disfluencies were removed while maintaining natural rhythm and intonation. Despite advances in audio editing software, producing clean results remains labor-intensive and imperfect, especially for spontaneous speech where such verbal stumbles are frequent and irregularly spaced.

title: 360 浏览器 Ai 插件导致的事故，前端小白一场酣畅淋漓的 bug 寻找之路
content: A company website broke in 360 Browser due to repeated loading loops. Investigation traced the issue to 360's hidden AI plugin inserting a #ai-assistant node at the end of body, conflicting with the watermark-js-plus plugin's MutationObserver, which continuously recreated its watermark node when not last. Reinstalling initially helped but later failed. The fix: disable MutationObserver in the watermark config or mount the watermark elsewhere than body.

title: 《置身钉内》之后：普通前端的出路在哪里？
content: A DingTalk employee's viral resignation letter sparked reflection among frontend developers about workplace dysfunction: chaotic direction, excessive reporting, and undefined impact. As AI tools raise productivity expectations without expanding organizational support, developers risk becoming mere "pressure layers." The author advises evaluating positions by three criteria: whether work builds transferable assets, whether one can exercise professional judgment, and whether teams demonstrate genuine respect. Rather than hastily resigning or enduring burnout, developers should steadily build capabilities—problem-solving depth, engineering maturity, business understanding, and AI-assisted judgment—while maintaining readiness to leave. The future belongs not to faster coders, but to those who can discern which problems warrant solving.

title: lama.cpp 目前有重大性能 bug： checkpoint 的巡回逻辑对于混合模型（比如 qwen3.6-27B）无效，从而导致大概率每次对话都要 prefill 全文，严重拖慢速度
content: llama.cpp has a critical performance bug where checkpoint caching fails for hybrid models like qwen3.6-27B. The checkpoint loop logic cannot restore previous context, causing full prefill reprocessing on every conversation turn. A May commit worsened this further. Testing shows NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell wastes ~40 seconds per request at 50K context, reprocessing 67K-71K tokens repeatedly. Checkpoints from longer prior requests are rejected when new prompts are shorter, forcing full reprocessing from the start. This makes llama.cpp with qwen3.6-27B unusable for agent tool workflows. The issue remains open.

title: 开源了一个 TUI 设计协议 skill：让 AI 把截图/描述变成 Bubble Tea / Ink / Textual 代码
content: A developer created "designing-tuis," a structured protocol to improve AI-generated terminal UI (TUI) code for frameworks like Bubble Tea, Ink, and Textual. The repository addresses common AI errors in layout proportions, borders, and responsiveness by providing a reproducible workflow: screenshots/descriptions are decomposed into three stages, then converted to framework-specific code or an intermediate .tui schema. It includes component references, layout inference rules, color accessibility guidelines, schema-to-code mappings, responsive scaling, render stability protocols, and iteration comparison methods. The documentation serves as a reference standard for developers and teams seeking consistent, multi-framework TUI generation.

title: 补贴→Token计费→降价，OpenAI打响价格战，Token经济学拐点将至？
content: OpenAI is considering sharply cutting Token prices to compete with Anthropic for enterprise customers, as both firms prepare for IPOs despite massive AI-related losses. The AI industry's three-year commercialization evolution—from subscription bundles to subsidies to Token-based billing—has exposed unsustainable costs: Uber exhausted its annual Token budget in four months, and only 18 cents per dollar of AI spending delivers actual user value. A price war would further erode already-negative margins, while the companies' highly interchangeable products prevent true competitive moats. Their financial links to cloud providers (Microsoft, Oracle, Google, Amazon) and chipmakers (Nvidia) mean distress could cascade through the ecosystem. Meanwhile, Chinese model DeepSeek, priced at roughly one-tenth of Western competitors, is gaining unexpected US enterprise traction through direct paid usage.

title: Codex 大降价要来了，这份官方指南手把手教你高效榨干额度
content: OpenAI is reportedly considering significant price cuts for Codex to compete with Anthropic. Codex, which has only 5 million weekly active users compared to ChatGPT's 1 billion, is being integrated into ChatGPT and promoted through a referral program that resets rate limits. OpenAI has published numerous official use cases demonstrating Codex's capabilities, including Computer Use for controlling applications, /goal mode for autonomous long-running tasks, GPT Image 2 for PowerPoint creation, screenshot-to-webpage conversion, browser game development with automated testing, and scientific research assistance including 150-hour model architecture experiments.

title: 存储涨价太疯狂，手机厂商下场拯救老设备：电池扩容、存储升级
content: Rising memory and storage costs have pushed smartphone prices up, dampening consumer upgrade willingness. In response, brands like Xiaomi, vivo, and Huawei are offering battery expansion and storage upgrade services for older devices to retain users in a saturated market. Xiaomi provides 189 yuan battery upgrades using silicon-anode technology for its 2022-2023 models, increasing capacity by 300-500mAh. Huawei and Honor offer memory upgrades via motherboard replacement, though at steep prices. With 2026 phone shipments projected to drop 15%, vendors are abandoning planned obsolescence strategies for user retention in fierce存量 competition.

title: 腾讯AI秘密“换船”：元宝失宠，WorkBuddy接棒
content: Tencent has shifted AI focus from Yuanbao to WorkBuddy, an office-focused AI agent launched in March 2026. WorkBuddy surged to 8.85 million monthly visits by March, with 831% month-over-month growth, by offering no-code, conversational task execution for non-technical workers. The team expanded from 10 to over 100 members, receiving unprecedented internal resources and promotion, surpassing Yuanbao in strategic priority. Tencent's WeChat also opened AI ecosystem access to all mini-program developers, leveraging 4 million+ mini-programs and 1 billion users. However, Tencent still lags in foundational models behind competitors like DeepSeek and Claude, creating vulnerability as its AI ecosystem grows increasingly dependent on model capabilities.

title: Anthropic CEO：政府应有权阻止高风险新模型部署
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei argues governments should have authority to block deployment of high-risk AI models. He advocates mandatory third-party testing to assess risks across multiple domains, comparing AI to cars, aircraft, or pharmaceuticals—essential technologies that can cause mass casualties if improperly designed or used. Anthropic previously restricted access to its Mythos model after discovering it could identify and exploit critical software vulnerabilities, later releasing a version with those cybersecurity attack capabilities removed.

title: 小米推出 AI 编程助手 MiMo Code 并开源
content: Xiaomi released MiMo Code V0.1.0, an open-source terminal AI coding assistant built on OpenCode with an MIT license. It features a built-in multimodal model MiMo-V2.5, supports third-party models like DeepSeek and Kimi, and uses a persistent memory system with project memory, session checkpoints, and task progress tracking. The tool includes automated workflow capabilities, voice input, a /dream command for weekly memory consolidation, and a Chinese-localized interface with a status dashboard.

title: 苹果 WWDC2026 拉完了
content: Apple's WWDC 2026 disappointed observers by avoiding major AI announcements, instead focusing on minor iOS updates like transparency adjustments. Its Siri AI relies on a self-developed model supplemented by Google's Gemini, widely seen as a stopgap measure due to Apple's inability to build competitive LLMs independently. The author criticizes this partnership as two laggards combining forces, noting Apple also abandoned its costly self-driving project. The perceived decline in innovation contributed to significant stock price drops.

title: Making secret scanning more trustworthy: Reducing false positives at scale
content: GitHub collaborated with Microsoft Security & AI to reduce false positives in secret scanning by adding LLM-based contextual verification. Instead of analyzing more code, the system extracts focused, high-signal usage context—such as whether a value is passed to APIs or authentication headers—to distinguish real secrets from random strings or test data. Tested on hundreds of customer-confirmed false positives, the approach achieved a 75.76% reduction, exceeding its 65% target while maintaining detection coverage.
